hero.title: Build technology that solves real problems.
hero.subtitle: Learn software development, networking, AI, and IoT by working on projects from your first semester.

philosophy.title: More than classes: training to solve real problems.
philosophy.body: The program combines critical thinking, technical practice, and collaboration so students build engineering judgement from early stages.

formation.title: A professionally oriented program.
formation.subtitle: Clear academic objective, industry-aligned graduate profile, and continuous connection with real contexts.

realAccess.title: Program objective
realAccess.body: Train professionals capable of integrating and managing IT and communications to deliver strategic value in organizations.

building.title: Graduate profile
building.body: Network design, hardware/software integration, and information systems development under international standards.

collaboration.title: Professional linkage
collaboration.body: Internships, academic visits, and formative events that connect learning with current industry practice.

projects.title: Projects and portfolio.
projects.subtitle: Learning evidence from labs, applied research, competitions, and academic activities that demonstrate real technical progress.

featured.name: Institutional portfolio
featured.description: Activities, projects, and learning experiences documented to show how engineering practice evolves across the program.

guides.name: Focus areas
guides.description: Academic tracks in data, interaction, emerging technologies, networks, and intelligent systems.

systems.name: Labs and practice
systems.description: Technical spaces and collaborative dynamics to experiment, iterate, and validate solutions in concrete scenarios.

infra.name: Continuous updates
infra.description: Specializations reviewed periodically to keep training aligned with current tools and needs.

mentors.title: Faculty.
mentors.subtitle: Professors with technical experience who guide professional growth in key ICT areas.

contact.title: Official contact.
contact.subtitle: Institutional channels to resolve questions about the program, admissions, curriculum, and academic activities.

outcomes.title: What will you be able to do?

items.solutions: Build technological solutions for real problems.
